user.title: Connect to Power Watchdog WiFi
user.description: Enter the credentials used by the official Power Watchdog WiFi app. This integration is read-only.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Power Watchdog cloud
error.no_devices: No Power Watchdog devices were found

abort.already_configured: This Power Watchdog is already configured

init.title: Connection settings
init.description: Choose how the integration connects to Power Watchdog cloud telemetry.

auth_failed.title: Authentication failed
auth_failed.description: Power Watchdog WiFi credentials are no longer accepted. Update credentials from the integration configuration and reload the integration.

cannot_connect.title: Cannot connect to Power Watchdog cloud
cannot_connect.description: The integration cannot currently reach the Power Watchdog cloud service. Check internet connectivity and cloud service availability, then reload the integration.

device_mapping_unsupported.title: Configured device mapping is unavailable
device_mapping_unsupported.description: The configured device was not returned by the account device list. Verify the selected device in the Power Watchdog app, then reconfigure the integration to select a currently available device.
